hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(requirements\.txt|main\.py|config/(settings|screener|watchlist)\.yaml)$' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"README.md may need updating — the file you just edited affects installation or run instructions. Update the relevant section of README.md now."}}\n' || true; }
